caption: A young man with blonde hair, glasses, and a mustache is speaking while wearing white over-ear headphones and a dark blue textured shirt. He is seated in front of a light-colored wood-paneled wall. To his left is a blurred Christmas tree decorated with colorful lights, and behind him is a framed blue graphic containing a white logo and the number "20". A black microphone is positioned in front of him. As he speaks, his facial expressions shift from an open-mouthed look of surprise to a more neutral expression, and then back to an open-mouthed state. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points, starting with a pointed finger on his left hand, moving his hand away, and then raising a single finger on his right hand towards the end of the sequence.
